Category filters

Project categories

Area movement

Leaderboard

Grouped by ZIP or area where public fields provide enough signal.

Anonymized signals

Stuck Permit Watchlist

Public-facing entries are intentionally anonymized. Owner names, emails, phone numbers, and full addresses are not shown here.

Friction patterns

Why projects get stuck

Zoning or overlay mismatch

Project scope can collide with local overlays, use limits, parking rules, or neighborhood-specific review triggers.

Prior permit record issue

Old permits, expired applications, or unresolved final records can slow the next clean approval path.

Fire / hillside / site constraints

Special site conditions can add layers that are easy to miss in a basic permit search.

Missing clearance

A permit can appear close while waiting on planning, public works, fire, sanitation, or other required clearances.

Correction-cycle drag

Repeated corrections, unclear scope, or incomplete response packages can turn a normal review into a long hold.

Form handled through the existing PermitPulse Formspree pattern.

Permit Review Plus

Need the full first-pass review?

Permit Review Plus checks official public records for one address, including permit history, planning/zoning signals, parcel profile, map layers, and obvious risk flags.

Address-level research stays private, not exposed in the public watchlist.
Built for a first-pass read before you spend on deeper professional review.
Price$149
Turnaround24-48 business hours

Express option: available for rush jobs when schedule allows.

Start Permit Review Plus
Disclaimer

This dashboard is a public-record intelligence tool. It is not a legal opinion, architectural opinion, engineering review, title report, survey, or guarantee. Always verify with the relevant agency and licensed professionals before making decisions.

© 2026 PermitPulse. Public-record permit intelligence for first-pass review.
